outline.description: I like computers!
Recent content on Bartosz Ciechanowski
Observations on US Antarctic infrastructure. Anecdotes from daily life for USAP support staff. Focused on McMurdo Station and Amundsen-Scott South Pole Station.
Compiled notes from the team
Recent content in Blogs on Drew DeVault's blog
I write essays about relationships, thought, and agency. I hang with our kids. We live on a pine covered island in the Baltic Sea. That's about it.
Explained from First Principles is a technology, science, and philosophy blog for curious people.
amos likes to tinker

outline.text: IntelliJ IDEA : IntelliJ IDEA – the IDE for Professional Development in Java and Kotlin | The JetBrains Blog
outline.description: Developer Tools for Professionals and Teams
Just a programmer trying to make a home for myself on the WWW.
My personal blog
Patrick McKenzie (patio11) blogs on software development, marketing, and general business topics
In-depth security news and investigation

"While I'm deeply sympathetic, the author should be discussing their issues with a therapist rather than spreading this on the internet."
I'm also trying out Unoffice Hours, where anyone can book time with me.
  1. If you're just a reader that wants to chat about whatever, you can grab me at this link. Don't pick crazy hours for yourself — you'll oversleep and have booked my calendar for no reason!
  2. If you want to chat and might buy consulting one day, you can use this link, which is exactly the same as the previous link but with more availability. It's just a social call, so it's honour system rules on not using it to sneak extra time from my calendar.
  3. If you live in Melbourne, this final link straight-up arranges an in-person meeting at a nice coffee place.
I read all mail without exception, and love getting it. I may not respond, but I'll always read! You can reach me at: ludicity.hackernews@gmail.com. My podcast, "Does A Frog Have Scorpion Nature", where I talk to people I like, and sometimes find blog post inspiration. You can also catch me on Mastodon. Liberapay | Patreon to support me writing taking time off to write amidst the difficulty of launching a business. I looked at some code in late 2024 which was so hideous that I rage-quit my job on the spot and started an IT consultancy, Hermit Tech. We sell the voice of reason to companies, especially on data-related issues. You can always book time with us to talk about your problems! I've worked with some readers before and everyone had a good time. We have some bold, innovative technology, such as not lying, explaining things clearly, and listening to people.
This subscriber-only feed contains the full text of all feature articles (those containing LWN original content and posted as standalone items) found on the site.
